Think 'fluid' systems and relentless pressing are new? Rinus Michels' Total Football with Ajax & Holland in the '70s invented it. No fixed positions, relentless movement, suffocating opponents. A chaotic brilliance that changed the game forever. Modern football just repackaged the blueprint. Don't @ me. #TacticsHistory #TotalFootball
